name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning update from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

A quick check-in before the chairs fill up. Yesterday brought a few new faces reaching out about consults, and a handful of cleanings moved through the books. Nothing that needs you right this second — just wanted you to walk in with the picture.

If anything looks off when you open the dashboard, it's probably worth a second glance. Otherwise, have a warm one out there.

— Bright Smile Dental
